goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'theatre'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'alexander bed and breakfast'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.
